steps.title: Use the requested measurement
steps.content: The student wants to specify the green iguana's average length. The relevant note states that the green iguana has an average length of 4.8 feet.

steps.title: Reject irrelevant facts
steps.content: Choice A gives habitat information. Choice C gives location and diet. Choice D gives classification and diet. None of those states the requested measurement. The correct sentence must give the average length directly. The answer is B.
